title: Add Storiva to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Storiva](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ismafly.storiva) to writing
- Storiva is an Android app that generates personalized illustrated children's stories where the child's own face appears in every illustration using AI inpainting.

Fixes #12013

gist.headline: Once upon a pixel
gist.blurb: Storiva just joined the ecosystem! It's a magical Android app that uses AI to put your child's face right into the illustrations of personalized stories.
gist.summary: Added Storiva, an Android app that generates personalized children's stories using AI inpainting to feature the child's face in illustrations, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: The community can now discover Storiva in the apps list and see a creative implementation of AI inpainting for personalized storybooks.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy storytelling scene. Polly the bee reading a glowing, magical children's book to the round Nomnom creature. The book's pages show a tiny pixelated face, representing the personalized inpainting feature.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, reading a glowing magical storybook to the round tan Nomnom creature. The book's pages show a tiny pixelated face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic, emotionally warm, magical storytelling vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, reading a glowing magical storybook to the round tan Nomnom creature. The book's pages show a tiny pixelated face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic, emotionally warm, magical storytelling vibes.
